productDisplayName: Nike Men Lebron Slide Red Sandals
description: It's all about exemplary comfort with the nike Lebron Slide sandals. Crafted with comfort and performance in mind with a cushioned foot-bed, there's nothing for your feet to complain about! Upper Made from synthetic leather for durability One wide and padded strap on the fore-foot with a velcro closure Perforations on both sides of the strap for breathable comfort Midsole Air sole unit midsole for exemplary comfort Padded and grooved foot-bed Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves for maximum grip and traction Impact guidance line shock absorption
